_authoring_notes: Phase 2 Events hub Section 1 — Hub intro paragraph + gold border-bottom divider.
Authored 2026-04-27 PM. Option B clone of existing WPBakery /events/ hub (page 5089) — preserves the existing visual design verbatim per Jonathan's review.
Element ID prefix: ehub-* (events hub) — distinct from event-detail-page prefixes (velocity-*, llss heroes, etc.).
Uses .fsi-hub-intro class from fsi-event-styles.php for typography + spacing. The gold rule below is added structurally as a border-bottom on the outer container (matches existing hub render).

Hub-shape consistency: Memberships hub uses navy full-bleed Alliance hero (a featured-content layout). Events hub uses a quieter intro pattern (no featured event) because all 4 events are visually equal in the stack below — featuring one would distort the calendar/hub function.

settings.html: Five Star Institute produces events for each of the four professions it serves. Each event is built around a specific professional community, with programming shaped by practitioners and content designed for how that community actually works. All four professions converge once a year at Five Star Conference.
